case_title: ZEBRA AWNING COMPANY, INC. VS. CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEBRA AWNING COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZEBRA AWNING COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEBRA AWNING COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZEBRA AWNING COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-22-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,163.79 AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINANE CONSTRUCTION, BRYAN MALONEY
